name: Contrast Checker
description: Check WCAG contrast ratio for text accessibility.
title: Contrast Checker
sampleBody: This combination is evaluated against WCAG AA and AAA thresholds.
recommendationExcellent: Safe for small text, large text and strict accessibility requirements.
recommendationGood: Usable for normal text under AA, but not ideal for stricter AAA targets.
recommendationPoor: Increase separation between foreground and background before using this pair.
